description: Creates a line perpendicular to an existing line through a given point.
utility: Create a perpendicular line through a point

arguments.name: line
arguments.description: Existing line to be perpendicular to

arguments.name: point
arguments.description: Point the perpendicular line passes through

alternates.description: Line perpendicular to existing line through given point

examples.scenario: Perpendicular from unit circle point to x-axis
examples.expression: graph_1 = g2d(at(4,19), size(20), range(-2, 2), type(geometry)); circle_1 = circle(graph_1, "x^2 + y^2 = 1"); point_1 = interpolate(graph_1, circle_1, 0, 1); line_2 = perp(graph_1, line(graph_1, "y = 0"), point_1, type(segment))

examples.scenario: Perpendicular from point to a line segment for slope animation
examples.expression: graph_1 = g2d(at(4,19), size(16), range(-5, 5), type(geometry)); point_1 = point(graph_1, -3, -2); point_2 = point(graph_1, 3, 2); line_1 = line(graph_1, point_1, point_2, type(segment)); point_3 = point(graph_1, -3.4, 3.0); line_2 = perp(graph_1, line_1, point_3, type(line))
